title: Hypixel SkyBlock RPG ++
description: Beautiful texture packs: Furfsky Reborn is now on 1.21.5, preview crafting, find out what the probability of an item falling out is
body:
## **Now on the version: 1.21.5 texture packs available: Furfsky Reborn**

This modpack is intended for the Skyblock game mode on hypixel.net.
# 🔧List of mods

<details>
<summary>Installed mods (23 mods)</summary>
  
## Global mods for hypixel:

  
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap)
- [Firmament for Hypixel SkyBlock](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)


## Performance Mods:


- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Sodium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extras)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)


## Miscellenious


- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)


## Librarys


- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)


</details>
